name: pnp-sp-dev-spfx-web-parts-react-bookmark-hub
title: React Bookmark Hub Web Part
shortDescription: A SharePoint Framework (SPFx) web part that allows users to manage and organize their bookmarks within SharePoint. Built with React, PnPjs and Fluent UI.
longDescription: A SharePoint Framework (SPFx) web part that allows users to manage and organize their bookmarks within SharePoint. Built with React, PnPjs and Fluent UI.

references.name: Build your first SharePoint client-side web part
references.description: Client-side web parts are client-side components that run in the context of a SharePoint page. Client-side web parts can be deployed to SharePoint environments that support the SharePoint Framework. You can also use modern JavaScript web frameworks, tools, and libraries to build them.
